name: Ranjith Kumar Siva Sankara Pillai
title: Full Stack Developer | Generative AI Engineer | Senior Software Engineer at Gainwell Technologies
summary: Results-driven Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience building enterprise-grade web applications and AI-powered systems.
Specializes in Angular (v2-v20), Node.js, micro frontends, real-time communication systems, and modern Generative AI stacks including LangChain, LangGraph, RAG pipelines, and MCP workflows.
Builds intelligent AI chat applications with streaming responses and context-aware agent workflows, while using GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex, and Claude to accelerate delivery.

Earlier Project Engineer 2 background with Schneider Electric delivering Triconex-TMR Emergency Shutdown System (ESD) and Turbo Machinery Control (TMC) solutions for petrochemical, oil and gas, and power industries.
certifications: ISTQB Certified - Test Engineer & Test Manager
be10x AI Tools & ChatGPT Workshop - Issued April 2026

highlights: Angular 4 to 20, Module federation MF and Host, Angular 4 to 18 Migration, Feature module creation.
JWT to PingOne OAuth2 Migration, Java Backend.
Led Angular migration from v4 to v18 and deployed to production, modernizing a large-scale enterprise codebase.
Re-architected JWT authentication to PingOne using OAuth2/OIDC and RBAC, strengthening enterprise identity and access management.
Designed and deployed agent-based AI chat workflows with LangChain and LangGraph, delivering context-aware streaming response experiences.
Delivered Angular UI modules with Node.js RESTful backends for multiple product lines.
Integrated real-time features using Socket.io, enhancing live collaboration and notification systems.
Developed Angular modules with server-side pagination and CDK Drag & Drop features.
Collaborated in agile sprints, contributed to code reviews, and maintained high code quality standards.
Working on Angular projects.
Developing ATM screens.
Mentoring others.
Built and maintained Angular + Node.js applications, ensuring cross-browser compatibility and responsive design.
Maintained and fixed ATM screen applications using Angular and TypeScript.
Implemented server-side pagination for large datasets and created MongoDB schemas using Mongoose ORM.
Delivered freelance programming and testing support across remote client work.
Delivered Triconex-TMR Emergency Shutdown System (ESD) and Turbo Machinery Control (TMC) solutions.
Prepared system cabinets, marshalling cabinets, network architecture, Functional Design Specifications, I/O assignments, termination lists, as-shipped drawings, and as-built drawings.
Developed shutdown logic from cause-and-effect drawings and commissioned instruments from multiple vendors.
Worked on engineering design activities for industrial project delivery.
Supported product assurance and quality engineering activities.
Worked as Project Engineer on industrial engineering and automation project delivery.
Supported project engineering activities for shipping operations.
